Class Room

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
gui.room.Room
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
Direct Known Subclasses:
BackdoorRoom, BedRoom, ColdZoneRoom, HotZoneRoom, ServingRoom
public abstract class Room extends javafx.scene.layout.Pane
Base class of all room UI

    • addItem

      public void addItem(BaseCounter counter, ItemSprite itemSprite)
      Add ItemSprite to counter of this room.
      Parameters:
      counter - Counter to be added item to that must be in this room.
      itemSprite - ItemSprite to add to the counter givem

    • removeItem

      public void removeItem(ItemSprite itemSprite)
      Remove ItemSprite from this room.
      Parameters:
      itemSprite - ItemSprite to be removed from this room

    • resetRoom

      public void resetRoom()
      Reset the room by clearing all ItemSprites in the room.

    • getCounterWhichHasItemSprite

      public BaseCounter getCounterWhichHasItemSprite(ItemSprite itemSprite)

      itemSprite - ItemSprite to find
      Returns:
      Counter that contains the ItemSprite

      public boolean isContainItemSprite(ItemSprite itemSprite)
      Check whether this room contain specific ItemSprite or not.
      Parameters:
      itemSprite - ItemSprite to check
      Returns:
      true if contains the ItemSprite

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)
      Check equality of this room and the other object.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      obj - the reference object with which to compare.
      Returns:
      true if that object is instance of Room and has the same name
